reviews.comment:
Espere y espere a qué alguien apareciera para poder poner combustible a mí moto, tal vez fue el frío.

I waited and waited for someone to show up so I could fuel my bike, maybe it was the cold.

reviews.comment:
El muchacho que atendió el viernes al medio día ,un genio,hasta me ayudó a salir del lugar, soy de Neuquén y andaba medio perdido,un genio el flaco

(Translated by Google)
The guy who helped me on Friday at noon was a genius; he even helped me get out of there. I'm from Neuquén and I was a bit lost. He was a real gem.

reviews.comment:
El ACA, el lugar elegido, como punto de encuentro para Mendoza Peluqueros Solidarios. Es cábala juntarnos ahí, tomar nuestro desayuno, y salir para realizar cortes Solidarios, por los distintos departamentos de la provincia.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) is the chosen meeting point for Mendoza Hairdressers in Solidarity. It's a tradition for us to meet there, have breakfast, and then head out to provide haircuts for charity in different parts of the province.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdlBYOXR3RRAB
